canonical_question: How do I architect a GraphQL API at scale?
aliases: GraphQL API design patterns at scale
how to design a scalable GraphQL API
constraints: Always implement query depth limiting and complexity analysis in production
Never expose GraphQL introspection in production environments
DataLoader is mandatory for any resolver that fetches from a database or external service
Persisted queries or an allowlist must be enforced in production
Federation gateway must be the only public entry point

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Building a simple internal API with <5 entity types and one team
skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: A single GraphQL monolith server without federation

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Need to migrate an existing REST API to GraphQL
Debugging N+1 query performance in an existing GraphQL API

often_confused_with.label: REST to GraphQL Migration (migration, not architecture design)

inputs_needed.question: What is your expected scale (concurrent users and queries per second)?
How many teams will contribute to the GraphQL schema?
Do you want a monolith GraphQL server or a federated architecture?
options: Schema stitching (merge multiple schemas at gateway)
